Class ParsingFacade

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.ParsingFacade
@NullMarked public final class ParsingFacade extends Object
This facade provides low-level access to the ANTLR4 Parser and Lexer.

You should only use it if you need access to the parse trees instead of terms or taclet structure.

  • Method Details

    • getParseRuleContext

      public static <T extends ParserRuleContext> @NonNull T getParseRuleContext(@NonNull KeyAst<T> ast)
      Use this function to retrieve the ParserRuleContext inside an KeyAst object. The use of this method is discouraged and should be avoided in all high level scenarios.
      Type Parameters:
      T - parse tree type
      Parameters:
      ast - a KeyAst object
      Returns:
      the ParserRuleContext inside the given ast object.

    • parseFiles

      public static List<KeyAst.File> parseFiles(URL url) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

      Parameters:

    • getValueDocumentation

      public static @NonNull String getValueDocumentation(@NonNull KeYParser.String_valueContext ctx)
      Translate a given context of a string_value grammar rule into a the literal value. In particular it truncates, and substitutes quote escapes \".
      Parameters:
      ctx - non-null context
      Returns:
      non-null string

    • parseIdDeclaration

      @Deprecated public static KeYParser.Id_declarationContext parseIdDeclaration(CharStream stream)
      Deprecated.
      Parse the id declaration. This a seldom special case somewhere in key.ui.

      Use is discourage.

      public static KeyAst.Taclet parseTaclet(String source)

    • parseTaclet

      public static KeyAst.Taclet parseTaclet(CharStream source)

    • parseConfigurationFile

      public static KeyAst.ConfigurationFile parseConfigurationFile(Path file) throws IOException
      Parses the configuration determined by the given file. A configuration corresponds to the grammar rule cfile in the KeYParser.g4.
      Parameters:
      file - non-null Path object
      Returns:
      monad that encapsluate the ParserRuleContext
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file is not found or not readable.
      BuildingException - if the file is syntactical broken.

    • parseConfigurationFile

      public static KeyAst.ConfigurationFile parseConfigurationFile(File file) throws IOException
      Parameters:
      file - non-null file to read as configuration
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file is not found or not readable.
      See Also:
      • parseConfigurationFile(Path)

    • parseConfigurationFile

      public static KeyAst.ConfigurationFile parseConfigurationFile(CharStream stream)
      Parses the configuration determined by the given stream. A configuration corresponds to the grammar rule cfile in the KeYParser.g4.
      Parameters:
      stream - non-null CharStream object
      Returns:
      monad that encapsluate the ParserRuleContext
      Throws:
      BuildingException - if the file is syntactical broken.

    • readConfigurationFile

      public static Configuration readConfigurationFile(CharStream input)
      Parses the configuration determined by the given stream. A configuration corresponds to the grammar rule cfile in the KeYParser.g4.
      Parameters:
      input - non-null CharStream object
      Returns:
      a configuration object with the data deserialize from the given file
      Throws:
      BuildingException - if the file is syntactical broken.

    • readConfigurationFile

      public static Configuration readConfigurationFile(Path file) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file is not found or not readable.

      public static Configuration readConfigurationFile(File file) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file is not found or not readable.
